description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden barrel with a rounded, slightly bulging body and a small open top. The barrel is constructed from vertical wooden staves, each with visible wood grain and subtle curvature, held together by two prominent black metal hoops—one near the top and one near the bottom. The metal bands are fastened with evenly spaced rivets, giving the barrel a sturdy, reinforced appearance. The top opening is circular and lacks a lid, revealing a hollow interior. The barrel sits on a patch of green grass adorned with small white flowers and tufts of grass, suggesting it is placed outdoors. The overall finish is clean and slightly glossy, with the wood appearing well-maintained and the metal bands polished.
description: A rounded wooden barrel with black metal hoops, open at the top and set on a grassy patch with small flowers. The wood is well-finished and the metal bands are polished, giving it a sturdy, outdoor-ready look.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from the front, showing the open top, wood grain, and both metal hoops clearly, with grass and flowers visible at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the curvature of the staves and the shine of the metal hoops, with fewer flowers visible on the grass.
description_view_2: The back view shows the barrel's rounded form and the alignment of the metal bands, with the grassy patch mostly clear of flowers.
description_view_3: This angle displays the opposite side, with more flowers and grass tufts around the base, and the open top still visible.
